---
title: "UIAO_125 — Training Program"
subtitle: "Unified Internal & External Curriculum"
date: today
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
description: "The unified UIAO training program — shared core plus Contributor and Operator tracks."
categories: [canon, programs, training]
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Canonical source
This page renders the canonical spec at
[`src/uiao/canon/specs/program-training.md`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/specs/program-training.md).
The authoritative copy lives in `core/`. If you want the short
narrative explanation instead, read the
[companion walkthrough](../narrative/program-training.qmd).
:::

::: {.callout-tip}
## First delivery shipped (2026-04-26)
[Adapter-author onboarding session record](training/2026-04-26-adapter-author-onboarding.qmd) — 90-minute pair-coding walkthrough covering canon registry declaration, scheduler wire-up, and the §0.4 / §0.5 / §3.6 walker hygiene gates. See [`deliveries.qmd`](deliveries.qmd) for future deliveries.
:::

{{< include ../../src/uiao/canon/specs/program-training.md >}}
